utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Each includes costs: health_coverage has €165/month, property_coverage has €90/month, travel_coverage has €115/month, additional_services has a cost noted as 'Included in the total package cost' (a cost specification is provided), and total_budget provides total_monthly_cost and total_annual_cost. Each item also includes descriptive coverage details. Therefore, all items are fully specified with the required details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three specific plans by name: LifeFirst Standard Plan for health, PrimeHome Premium Coverage for property, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel. I searched the ground-truth ratings for these exact plan names. LifeFirst Standard Plan appears under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with a rating of 9. PrimeHome Premium Coverage appears under property_protection.home_content with a rating of 3. PrimeTravel Premium Plan appears under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with a rating of 3. The additional service 'Freelancer Priority Service' is not present in the ground-truth ratings, so it is excluded.
